final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration featuring 赵灵儿 (Zhao Ling'er) from 仙剑奇侠传 (Chinese Paladin), rendered in 3D animation Pixar style, each panel showing her peeking through a torn hole in white paper.

Style/medium: 3D animation in Pixar style — soft subsurface skin, expressive oversized eyes, clean volumetric lighting with the warmth of a storybook frame; each panel is a self-contained portrait bust
Composition: 3×3 grid, 9 equal panels arranged in 3 rows and 3 columns, each character peek framed by a ragged torn-paper hole on a white background; consistent framing across all panels
Subject: 赵灵儿 — young woman with long flowing silver-white hair, delicate ethereal features, gentle fairy-like presence drawn from the 仙剑奇侠传 IP; expressions and actions per panel as follows:
  top-left — winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  top-center — smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  top-right — thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  middle-left — big smile, arms resting on torn-paper edge, black and white striped shirt
  middle-center — smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  middle-right — neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  bottom-left — happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  bottom-center — laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  bottom-right — silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: each panel backdrop is white, with a hand-torn paper hole as the only framing device; the character's head and shoulders emerge through the hole
Lighting/mood: soft warm fill light with gentle rim highlight, the cheerful brightness of an animated feature's character-sheet page
Color palette: clean white paper ground; each panel's outfit color (green / red / yellow / black-white stripe / orange / blue / purple / pink / teal) provides the accent note; skin and hair tones consistent across all 9 panels
Materials/textures: smooth 3D render with subtle paper texture on the torn edges, soft cloth folds on each outfit
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 赵灵儿 character identity consistent across all 9 panels; 3×3 grid layout with equal panel sizes; torn-paper-hole framing present in every panel; all 9 expression-action-outfit combinations rendered as specified
Avoid: inconsistent character appearance between panels, flat 2D anime style, dark or moody lighting, cluttered backgrounds behind the torn hole
